Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\gianluca\\Desktop\\deep-learning-notebooks\\delivery 1 CNN" && python -c "
import json
with open\('P1-CNNs-part1.ipynb'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    if cell['cell_type'] != 'code': continue
    for o in cell.get\('outputs', []\):
        lines = o.get\('text', []\)
        text = ''.join\(lines\) if isinstance\(lines, list\) else lines
        if 'test_acc' in text or 'val_acc' in text:
            print\(f'=== Cell {i} ==='\)
            print\(text[:2000]\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\gianluca\\Desktop\\deep-learning-notebooks\\delivery 1 CNN" && python -c "
import json
with open\('P1-CNNs-part1.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    if cell['cell_type'] != 'code': continue
    for o in cell.get\('outputs', []\):
        lines = o.get\('text', []\)
        text = ''.join\(lines\) if isinstance\(lines, list\) else lines
        if 'test_acc' in text or 'Epoch' in text:
            print\(f'=== Cell {i} ==='\)
            print\(text[:3000]\)
            print\(\)
")
